<!-- What problem does this feature solve? What are you trying to do that RINSE doesn't support today? -->

<!-- Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible — command flags, TUI interactions, output format, etc. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Have you tried any workarounds? Are there other ways to solve this problem? -->

## Who benefits

<!-- Is this specific to your workflow, or would it help many RINSE users? -->
